name: Hauts-de-Seine (France)
description: Beneath a blue chief crossed by a wavy white fess, the field is divided per pale: the hoist blue with a gold fleur-de-lis, the fly red with a white sailing ship.
history: The arms join the fleur-de-lis of France with the silver ship of Paris, the wavy bar standing for the river Seine that names the department.

features.role: field per pale blue and red
